Materials.description: URL of the Materials Management service

tags.name: vocabulary
tags.description: Access to Substance and Material vocabulary values

post.description:
A single substance is validated, identified and stored synchronously.
If the request is successful, the substance including the identifications will be returned.
If the substance is invalid (for example a string is passed for a numeric field), then the request will fail.

requestBody.description: Substance to be registered

201.description: Created. Returns the created substance including the generated identifications for a successful request.

get.description: Synchronously returns the requested single substance

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of substance to return. For example dsmat:Substance-28991d9cd69147e1be51a0fd47c6380c

patch.description:
Synchronously edits an existing substance.
If needed identification will be run again for the updated substance.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the substance to edit. For example dsmat:Substance-28991d9cd69147e1be51a0fd47c6380c

get.description: Get vocabulary Allergen matching the requested criteria.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Optional OData parameter that specifies how many items to return. Example $top=10 will return 10 items

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Optional OData parameter that specifies how many items to skip from the start of the items to return. Example $skip=7 will skip the first 7 items from the results

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Optional OData parameter that specifies the order of the items returned. Example $orderby=name desc will order the results by name in descending order

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Optional OData parameter that specifies a filter for the items to return. Dates are expected in UTC format. For example $filter=contains(tolower(prefLabel)=tolower('ab')).

post.summary: Add new entry to the Allergen vocabulary
post.description: Add new entry to the Allergen vocabulary.

requestBody.description: New vocabulary entry to be added

201.description: Created. Returns the created vocabulary entry.

patch.summary: Edits an existing entry in the Allergen vocabulary
patch.description: Updates an existing entry in the Allergen vocabulary.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the vocabulary entry to update, for instance 28991d9cd69147e1be51a0fd47c6380c

requestBody.description: Existing vocabulary entry to be edited

200.description: Updated. Returns the updated vocabulary entry.

post.description:
A single material is validated, identified and stored synchronously.
If the request is successful, the material will be returned.
If the material is invalid (for example the ratiotarget is less than the ratioMinimum), then the request will fail.
### Note
There is a difference between composed sub-objects of the material (for example assigned identifier) whose lifetime is controlled as part of the composing object and references to other non-compositional objects (for example material type).
Do not specify an id for composed objects: these will be created as part of the composing object. An error will be generated if an id is specified for a composed object. 
When referring to a non-compositional object, an id must be specified, except when the object is outside of the service (such as a supplier) when the unique name of the external object may be specified instead of the id.
Any other properties specified for non-compositional object references will be ignored.
Any unrecognized properties specified for compositional objects will be ignored.

From 26xFD01, valSigFigs and valUnit can be sent for quantities in the formulation property set, but for backwards compatibility, it is supported to just provide the values on the default SI units.

requestBody.description: Material to be registered

get.description: Synchronously returns the requested single material. It will also accept an i3dx identifier for a specific revision. The specific material revision will then be returned along with some additional revision information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Either the ID of the material to return or the i3dx identifier of a material revision. For example dsmat:Stuff

patch.description:
Synchronously edits the given material. As you would expect for an application/merge-patch+json body passing null as the value for a property value will delete the existing property.
### Notes
There is a difference between composed sub-objects of the material whose lifetime is controlled as part of the composing object (for example assigned identifiers) and references to other non-compositional objects (for example material type).
Non-compositional objects may only be referred to by "id": any other properties specified for these objects will be ignored. Compositional objects without an "id" will be treated as new objects replacing the existing object property value.
Compositional objects with an "id" will be treated as updates to the existing object property value.

Edits to the formulation property set follow slightly different rules. The current formulation property set can be edited to add or remove properties. Alternatively, a new formulation property set can be specified to replace it. A new formulation property set can refer to any properties in the current formulation property set (or in any property set on the material) by specifying just the id of the property. The referenced properties must already be properties of the material. The properties themselves are inmmutable, hence new or changed properties must not specify an id, otherwise the value will be ignored.

From 26xFD01, valSigFigs and valUnit can be sent for quantities, but for backwards compatibility, it is supported to just provide the values on the default SI units.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the material to edit. For example dsmat:Stuff

post.description:
A single lot is validated and stored synchronously.
If the request is successful, the lot will be returned.
If the lot is invalid (for example an invalid lifecycle state is passed), then the request will fail. Currently only externally managed lots can be created

get.description: Synchronously returns the requested single lot

patch.description:
Synchronously edits an existing lot.
As you would expect for an application/merge-patch+json body passing null as the value for a property value will delete the existing property.

isActive.description: Flag which indicates if it's active or not

externalId.description: A corresponding identifier in an external system. When referring to Allergen instances, either the id to specify the uri, or the externalId property to specify the external identifier can be used.

isActive.description: Flag which indicates if it's active or not

externalId.description: A corresponding identifier in an external system. When referring to Allergen instances, either the id to specify the uri, or the externalId property to specify the external identifier can be used.

isActive.description: Flag which indicates if it's active or not

externalId.description: A corresponding identifier in an external system. When referring to Allergen instances, either the id to specify the uri, or the externalId property to specify the external identifier can be used.

id.description: Assigned Identifier URI of the assigned identifier to be updated.

PropertySetFormulation.description:
The current formulation property set.

From 26xFD01, valSigFigs, valUnit and valUnitDisplayLabel will be returned for quantities, but this will allways be in the default SI units for backwards compatibility.

val.description: The material's auto-ignition temperature in Kelvin
The material's boiling point temperature in Kelvin
The material's density in kg per cubic metre
The material's density in Newton-second per square metre ie Pascal-second
The material's flash point temperature in Kelvin
The material's meilting point temperature in Kelvin
The material's vapor pressure in Pascal

PropertySetFormulationCreate.description:
The formulation property set on creation or update. It can be edited to add or remove properties. Alternatively, a new formulation property set can be specified to replace it.  A new formulation property set can refer to any properties in the current formulation property set (or in any property set on the material) by specifying just the id of the property. The referenced properties must already be properties of the material. The properties themselves are inmmutable, hence new or changed properties  must not specify an id, otherwise the value will be ignored.

From 26xFD01, valSigFigs and valUnit can be sent for quantities,  but for backwards compatibility, it is supported to just provide the values on the default SI units.

val.description: The material's auto-ignition temperature. If not valUnit is given, the default is Kelvin
The material's boiling point temperature. If not valUnit is given, the default is Kelvin
The material's density. If not valUnit is given, the default is kg per cubic metre
The material's density. If not valUnit is given, the default is Newton-second per square metre ie Pascal-second
The material's flash point temperature. If not valUnit is given, the default is Kelvin
The material's meilting point temperature. If not valUnit is given, the default is Kelvin
The material's vapor pressure. If not valUnit is given, the default is Pascal

accept-language.name: Accept-Language
accept-language.description: Specifies the language for any error messages, etc that have translations. For example 'en'

top.name: $top
top.description:
Optional OData parameter that specifies how many items to return.
Example $top=10 will return 10 items

skip.name: $skip
skip.description:
Optional OData parameter that specifies how many items to skip from the start of the items to return.
Example $skip=7 will skip the first 7 items from the results

orderby.name: $orderby
orderby.description:
Optional OData parameter that specifies the order of the items returned.
Example $orderby=name desc will order the results by name in descending order

filter.name: $filter
filter.description:
Optional OData parameter that specifies a filter for the items to return. 
Dates are expected in UTC format.
For example $filter=contains(tolower(prefLabel)=tolower('ab')).

expand.name: $expand
expand.description:
Optional parameter that specifies the mask to use for the request. 
For example, '$expand=FormulationPropertySet' switches the mask to one which includes the formulation property set of a material.

ifMatch.name: If-Match
ifMatch.description: Optional header that makes the request conditional on the resource having a matching etag. If the etag does not match then a 412 (Precondition failed) response is returned.
